## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine content strategy for Prophecy, focusing on keyword clusters and topic prioritization for upcoming content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reviewed topic clusters and keyword strategies, with a focus on ETL modernization](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on 15-20 topics by early January for initial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Planning to start with closely product-related topics, balancing keyword difficulty and search volume](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Aim to begin article production in January, including calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Using keyword research to identify potential topics related to Prophecy's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Categorized topics into master categories for easier review (e.g., ETL/ELT, AI and ML integration)](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Goal: Identify 10-20 initial topics to start content production in January](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Strategy includes both bottom-funnel (product-related) and top-funnel (educational) content](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Keyword Analysis Process

  - [Considered Prophecy's offerings, customer needs, and competitor topics](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Analyzed keywords for search volume, difficulty, and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Average keyword difficulty of 43 for sample ETL topic, with 27,000 monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Balancing high-difficulty, high-relevance keywords with easier, high-volume opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Content Clustering Approach

  - [Building topic clusters to establish thought leadership and improve ranking chances](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Creating interconnected content pieces (e.g., definitions, guides, listicles) around core topics](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Focus on depth and quality to enhance ranking potential over time](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Feedback and Refinement Process

  - [Team to review and rate topics on a 1-4 scale](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Provide comments on topic relevance and keyword accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Vivek's team to refine categories and rerun analysis based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

### Content Production Timeline

  - [Aim for initial feedback by end of week or early January](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Target mid-January for finalizing topics for the month](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Plan to produce first calibration articles in early January for review](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)

### Extended Content Opportunities

  - [Potential for creating gated assets (e.g., ebooks) based on identified topics](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Possibility of incorporating subject matter expert input into longer-form content](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
  - [Team to explore workflow for creating extended content pieces (5-10 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt and team to review and provide feedback on 15-20 topics by early January](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Vivek's team to refine categories and rerun analysis based on initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Schedule discussion in January to plan gated content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Aim to have calibration articles ready for review in the first week of January](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Begin regular content production mid-January, ramping up gradually](https://fathom.video/share/r-e2_zariGhfWK6W8YFRapP5DcxAtCkj?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
